recommendations.title: Anaïs in Love
recommendations.overview: A young woman struggling to stay on top of everything in her life meets a married publisher and begins an affair with him.

recommendations.title: Niagara
recommendations.overview: Rose Loomis and her older, gloomier husband, George, are vacationing at a cabin in Niagara Falls, N.Y. The couple befriend Polly and Ray Cutler, who are honeymooning in the area. Polly begins to suspect that something is amiss between Rose and George

recommendations.title: Caught by a Wave
recommendations.overview: A summer fling born under the Sicilian sun quickly develops into a heartbreaking love story that forces a boy and girl to grow up too quickly.

recommendations.title: One Man Band

recommendations.title: Angel of Mine
recommendations.overview: A woman grieving over the death of her daughter loses grip of reality when she begins to think her girl may still be alive.

recommendations.title: Only You
recommendations.overview: The passionate love between a former boxer and a beautiful blind woman.

recommendations.title: Earthquake Bird
recommendations.overview: Tokyo, Japan, 1989. Lucy Fly, a foreigner who works as a translator, begins a passionate relationship with Teiji, a mysterious man obsessed with photography.

recommendations.title: Bad Timing
recommendations.overview: Alex Linden is a psychiatrist living in Vienna who meets Milena Flaherty though a mutual friend. Though Alex is quite a bit older than Milena, he's attracted to her young, carefree spirit. Despite the fact that Milena is already married, their friend

recommendations.title: Below Her Mouth
recommendations.overview: An unexpected affair quickly escalates into a heart-stopping reality for two women whose passionate connection changes their lives forever.

recommendations.title: Death Defying Acts
recommendations.overview: On a tour of Britain in 1926, Harry Houdini enters into a passionate affair with a psychic out to con the famous magician.
